'''zhahuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rnd|rnd]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rnd|rnd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhahuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæhirith|zhæhirith]] || [[word:zhæhirij|zhæhirij]] || [[word:zhæhirish|zhæhirish]] || [[word:zhæhiri|zhæhiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhahuhuruth|zhahuhuruth]] || [[word:zhahuhuruj|zhahuhuruj]] || [[word:zhahuhurush|zhahuhurush]] || [[word:zhahuhuru|zhahuhuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhahuruth|zhahuruth]] || [[word:zhahuruj|zhahuruj]] || [[word:zhahurush|zhahurush]] || [[word:zhahuru|zhahuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhahufruth|zhahufruth]] || [[word:zhahufruj|zhahufruj]] || [[word:zhahufrush|zhahufrush]] || [[word:zhahufruf|zhahufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhahuruthu|zhahuruthu]] || [[word:zhahuruju|zhahuruju]] || [[word:zhahurushu|zhahurushu]] || [[word:zhahuruku|zhahuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhahuruth|zhahuruth]] || [[word:zhahuruj|zhahuruj]] || [[word:zhahurush|zhahurush]] || [[word:zhahuru|zhahuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhahuruthul|zhahuruthul]] || [[word:zhahurujul|zhahurujul]] || [[word:zhahurushul|zhahurushul]] || [[word:zhahurukul|zhahurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhahuruthuthu|zhahuruthuthu]] || [[word:zhahurujuju|zhahurujuju]] || [[word:zhahurushushu|zhahurushushu]] || [[word:zhahuruku|zhahuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhahuruthun|zhahuruthun]] || [[word:zhahurujun|zhahurujun]] || [[word:zhahurushun|zhahurushun]] || [[word:zhahurukun|zhahurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhahuruthuoro|zhahuruthuoro]] || [[word:zhahurujuoro|zhahurujuoro]] || [[word:zhahurushuoro|zhahurushuoro]] || [[word:zhahurukuoro|zhahurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
